data.body:
Implement arc flash study as a part of your electrical safety protocol. With Care Labs as your partner, turn risks in your power systems into data-driven solutions.

## Arc Flash Study

## Boost Safety and Compliance with Effective Arc Flash Study

An Arc flash study is a critical electrical analysis that identifies the risks in the power system. Care Labs offers detailed arc flash studies that adhere to safety standards like AS/NHS 4836, OSHA, IEEE, and NFPA 70E.

## Tools

## Software Suite- ETAP Arc Flash Study

ETAP is a premium software that helps Care Labs offer credible and compliant power system solutions. ETAP combines powerful calculation algorithms, comprehensive device modeling, and user-friendly reporting tools, making it a strong choice for conducting arc flash studies that meet IEEE 1584 and NFPA 70E requirements.

FAQ’s

## Questions & Answers

Find answers to all your questions in our comprehensive FAQ section. From detailed explanations about our services to insights into industry standards and compliance, we’ve got you covered. At Care Labs, we’re here to ensure you have all the information you need to make confident decisions.

### What is an arc flash study and why is it important for Australian industries?

Arc Flash studies are part of power system analysis for risk assessment and electrical safety. It pinpoints areas of high risk and helps take the necessary safety measures to prevent danger to equipment and personnel.

### How can I get A free quote from Care Labs?

You can contact us directly to get a free quote for an arc flash study in any Australian facility.

### How do I know my facility needs an arc flash study?

An arc flash study is typically undertaken by facilities after an incident or near-miss incident. However, it is imperative to follow guidelines issued by WHS Legislation and the Duty of Care.

### Which standards or guidelines apply if we want to do an arc flash study?

Australian standards like AS/NZS 3000 (Wiring Rules), AS/NZS 4836, AS/NZS 61439, etc, and other international standards like OSHA, IEEE, etc are considered by Care Labs arc flash study in Australia.

### Do we need special PPE categories based on arc flash energy levels?

Arc-rated PPE is selected based on incident energy calculations done at various nodes in a network. Australian WHS laws require you to provide PPE suited to the hazard.
